name: Welsbach Technology Metals Acquisition Corp. one right to receive 1/10th of a share of common stock
summary: Welsbach Technology Metals Acquisition Corp. one right to receive 1/10th of a share of common stock represents rights issued by Welsbach Technology Metals Acquisition Corp. Each right entitles the holder to receive one-tenth of a share of common stock upon completion of a business combination. These rights are often included as part of a unit offering in SPACs.
